formula_plain_text: When the working distance differs from the default for the equipment type, the incident-energy result is corrected per §10.4.

symbols.meaning: Default working distance from Annex C

applicable_range.note: Engineering judgment required for working distances outside this range; IEEE 1584:2018 model assumes typical maintenance approach distances.

values_per_voltage_class_per_config._note: IEEE 1584:2018 §10.4 specifies per-class per-config distance-adjustment formulas. Coefficient values pending transcription from Table 8 (or equivalent in published references).

worked_examples.source: IEEE 1584:2018 §10.4 worked example — energy decreases at greater distance
